title: Harry Fire Phoenix Building Set, 938 PCS Magic World Phoenix Model Set, Ideas Bird Animal Model Collectible Toys, Creative DIY Gift Toy for Boys Girls, Compatible with Major Brands (7032)
features: Classic Reproduction: Reproduce the classic magic harry fire phoenix pet and experience the fun of the magic world. This highly detailed building set lets you build an impressive harry Phoenix model, including beautiful feathers and a rotatable head and Remote rod rotating linkage wings.Its flexible legs are designed to grip the pole, adding a sense of realism and movement

Creative Design: This harry fire phoenix building kit offers a fun play experience, just turn the handle and the cleverly designed connecting wings will flap effortlessly, the phoenix's tail feathers can be opened and closed, and the phoenix's head is adjustable. Make the fire phoenix become beautiful and vivid more attractive, it is a good gift for you to give to the fan movie fans

Collectible Display: The model consists of 938 pieces and measures 64.8 x 40 x 27.5 cm. The model is the great display size, cool and high-quality, features exquisite craftsmanship and impressive design. Once built, it will make a stunning collection and display. You can display this masterpiece in your home, office, bookshelf or anywhere else

Fun to Build: Equipped with easy-to-understand assembly steps, the instructions are printed in clear colors, providing a rich gaming experience. Enjoy the fun of building and immerse yourself in the world of building blocks. Home learning games for everyone. Playing with your children will be a great family time

Exquisite Gifts: For building block lovers who like the medieval style, the magic building block set is a great choice. It comes in a beautiful gift box, making it a great gifts for boys and girls whether it is Christmas, children's birthdays, Children's Day or other holidays. Of course, it is also a good purchase choice for beginners or adults who like to play with building block toys, and the design of each style is very exciting and has a collectible value
description: Product Description Product Description The Fire Phoenix Blocks Set is a sight to behold! Detailed Display The legs of the harry fire phoenix building set feet swing flexibly. Turn the axis, the harry fire phoenix wings can be incited. Harry Fire Phoenix head can rotate. You can put the fire phoenix model toy in your home or other places for decoration, it will be a good gift for Harry fans as well as decorations!
